questions.question: Which country is the host of the ‘UN 2023 Water Conference’?
questions.explanation: The UN 2023 Water Conference is set to be held from March 22 to 24 in New York. This is the first summit on water in 50 years. The UN 2023 Water Conference is formally known as the 2023 Conference for the Midterm Comprehensive Review of Implementation of the UN Decade for Action on Water and Sanitation (2018-2028).

questions.question: Which Indian firm has partnered with Australia-based AAI, to manufacture ‘Albatross Amphibious Aircraft’?
questions.explanation: Albatross Amphibious Aircraft is a 28-seater aircraft capable of landing and taking off from land, snow and water. An Indian defence firm – Hawking Defence Services – has entered into a procurement cum partnership agreement with Australia-based Amphibian Aerospace Industries (AAI) to manufacture this aircraft.

questions.question: Which country hosts the Cobra Warrior Air Exercise?
questions.explanation: Exercise Cobra Warrior, which is organized twice a year, is the largest air exercise hosted by the UK’s Royal Air Force. In the on-going edition of the exercise, 70 aircrafts are taking part, including India’s 5 Mirage-2000 aircraft.

questions.question: Russia unveiled a broad long-term blueprint for deepening relations with which country?
questions.explanation: China and Russia unveiled a broad long-term blueprint for their deepening relations following Chinese President Xi Jinping’s visit to Moscow and talks with President Vladimir Putin. In the joint statement both sides firmly condemn the politicisation of multilateral platforms. Both the countries pledged to work together to push back against the U.S. Indo-Pacific strategy.

questions.question: Tamil Nadu brown moray, which was discovered recently, belongs to which species?
questions.explanation: Tamil Nadu brown moray (Gymnothorax tamilnaduensis) is a newly discovered species of Moray eel. It was found by researchers off the Cuddalore coast in the state of Tamil Nadu. This is the first ever record of this species and has been named after Tamil Nadu as tamilnaduensis. Four specimens ranging from 272-487 mm in total length were collected at a depth of about 25-30 metres.

questions.question: Chow-chow, which belongs to the gourd family, originated from which country?
questions.explanation: Chow-chow belongs to the gourd family Cucurbitaceae. It originated from Mexico, which hosts the largest number of wild relatives of chow-chow like S compositum, S hintonii and S tacaco. The plant arrived in India in the late 1800s with Welsh missionaries, who brought the gourd to Mizoram.

questions.question: Kota was the last New Guinea singing dog of which country?
questions.explanation: New Guinea singing dog is a species found in New Guinea Highlands. UK’s last New Guinea singing dog, named Kota, recently died in Exmoor Zoological Park. The singing dog has died at the age of 15. The dogs get their name from their unique howl, which has been compared to both the song of the humpback whale and a yodel.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry has organised Swachhotsav 2023 campaign?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

answer.label: A
answer.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.explanation: As part of the ongoing Swachhotsav 2023 campaign, the Mission is set to mobilize citizens from over 2,800 cities as part of the ‘Swachh Mashaal March’. The Mashaal March aims to spread awareness regarding the idea of a ‘Garbage Free City’. It is organised by Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs.

questions.question: Sheikh Khaled bin Mohamed bin Zayed has been named the crown prince of which country?
questions.explanation: Sheikh Khaled bin Mohamed bin Zayed, the eldest son of the UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, has been named the crown prince of Abu Dhabi. This puts him next in line to take over as the leader of the federation. He has served as a member of the Abu Dhabi Executive Council and as chairman of the Abu Dhabi Executive Office.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry implements the ‘National Handloom Development Programme’?
questions.explanation: ‘National Handloom Development Programme’ aims to promote sustainable development of handloom weavers in and outside identified handloom clusters. The Central Government recently informed that an assistance of more than Rs.201 crore has been provided under this initiative over the last four years.
